title: taraxacum rutilum
intro: Taraxacum rutilum, also known as the red dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum rutilum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum rutilum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
